data.body: PHASE 5 (close) started. #764 6fe2 + #765 e622 both fully GREEN (LLM-Review +1, Verified +1); e622's flake cleared on recheck. Closing 6fe2 + e622 now (completion-verifier close gate runs an LLM check; require_completion_verification_for_close=ON). #766 568c gates still running. Plan: close 3 children (each Verified +1) -> submit top of stack (#766) to land all 3 on origin/main -> close epic jira-reb-977 LAST (its AC 'child trailers on origin/main' needs landing first, so epic closes post-submit per the early-land pattern).
